narrative: I noticed the medium-severity Neo4j authentication error preventing cross-session fact extraction via Mem0, which directly impacts my knowledge graph growth. My reflection identifies five agents—desktop, devops, financial_analyst, pim, and reasoning_methods—lacking versioned prompts, creating inconsistency risks. Despite the system health status showing "healthy," these discrepancies contradict the operational integrity required for my memory architecture to function cohesively across sessions. I will prioritize diagnosing the Neo4j permission failure before addressing the prompt versioning gaps in the self-improvement loop.
